title: Lagavulin Matriarch
move_pattern: Starts with Sleep. When asleep (has Asleep power), repeats Sleep. When awake, cycles: Slash → Disembowel → Slash 2 → Soul Siphon → Slash
notes: Complex sleep/wake mechanic: Lagavulin Matriarch starts asleep with the Asleep and Plating powers. While asleep, she only uses her Sleep move. When taking damage, if her HP drops to 50% or below, her eyes visually open (animation change) but she remains mechanically in her asleep state. The move pattern is conditional on the Asleep power state. Soul Siphon reduces the player's Strength and Dexterity by 2 each while increasing her own Strength by 2, making her progressively more dangerous and the player weaker.
